description: Introduces engineers to applications of total quality concepts and tools to develop, implement, and maintain an effective quality assurance system in a manufacturing or service organization. Emphasis is on documentation development, team-based improvement strategies, and international quality standards.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Junior standing andI SY E 315, or graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Junior standing andI SY E 315, or graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
